title: atropa humilis
intro: Atropa humilis, also known as the dwarf or lesser black nightshade, is a plant species within the Solanaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Atropa humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
